prompt:
Hero product photograph — 16:9 landscape — of SIX intact Dialed Moods Cognition Elixir cans (12 fl oz tall slim format) on a pure flat WHITE background (#FFFFFF, uniform, no gradient, no ledge, no surface, no environment). The camera angle, the can positions, the can sizing within the frame, and the pyramid arrangement MUST EXACTLY MATCH reference 1 (the previous deconstructed-ingredients version) — same low up-angle, same six column positions, same vertical heights, same horizontal spacing.

LEFT-TO-RIGHT ORDER (six cans in the staggered pyramid, all bases on the same invisible ground plane, low up-angle perspective so cans further back appear slightly higher in frame):
1. Back-row LEFT (outermost left, ~50% visible): Lychee can (ref 2)
2. Middle-row LEFT (~60–70% visible): Black Cherry Vanilla can (ref 3)
3. Front-row LEFT (closest, fully visible, TOUCHING the front-right with zero gap): Secret Juice can (ref 4)
4. Front-row RIGHT (closest, fully visible, TOUCHING the front-left): Lemonade can (ref 5)
5. Middle-row RIGHT (~60–70% visible): Sour Watermelon Candy can (ref 6)
6. Back-row RIGHT (outermost right, ~50% visible): Blue Glacier can (ref 7)

REPLACE the deconstructed colored-rings-with-floating-ingredients of reference 1 with the FULL intact cans — each can rendered as a complete cylindrical 12 fl oz slim aluminum can with:
- The colored TOP cap (small ring with black sipping mouth)
- The colored TOP banner with "CLEAN ENERGY & CALM FOCUS" text
- The white MAIN body with the gold/cream "DIALED" wordmark prominently center, the flavor name in a vertical colored ribbon on the left side ("LYCHEE", "BLACK CHERRY VANILLA", "STRAWBERRY KIWI", "LEMONADE", "SOUR WATERMELON CANDY", "BLUE GLACIER" — except Secret Juice which has a diagonal black "SECRET JUICE" banner over the front), "Prize With Every Can" vertical text, the fruit illustration, the QR sticker, the "COGNITION ELIXIR" text below DIALED
- The colored BOTTOM band with "DIETARY SUPPLEMENT  5 CALORIE  ZERO SUGAR  12 FL OZ (355 mL)" text

Each can's labels MUST be hyperrealistic, sharp, and ACCURATE to its product reference (refs 2–7). The "DIALED" gold wordmark must be perfectly legible on every can. All text must be clean and readable, not warped, not garbled. Use refs 2–7 strictly for label artwork — every detail (typography, colors, position of fruit illustration, vertical flavor ribbon, top banner, bottom band, QR code, "Prize With Every Can" text) must match its ref one-to-one.

CRITICAL TEXT ACCURACY — the vertical flavor-name ribbon on the LEFT side of each can MUST be spelled EXACTLY as follows (no misspellings, no extra letters, no dropped letters, no swapped letters). Render the text PRECISELY:
- Lychee can: vertical ribbon reads "LYCHEE" (six letters: L-Y-C-H-E-E)
- Black Cherry Vanilla can: vertical ribbon reads "BLACK CHERRY VANILLA" (three words exactly — B-L-A-C-K  C-H-E-R-R-Y  V-A-N-I-L-L-A). Spell "CHERRY" with one H, two R's, one Y. Spell "VANILLA" with one N, two L's, one A at end.
- Secret Juice can: large diagonal black banner reads "SECRET JUICE" (two words: S-E-C-R-E-T  J-U-I-C-E), with smaller "STRAWBERRY KIWI" vertical text on the left.
- Lemonade can: vertical ribbon reads "LEMONADE" (eight letters: L-E-M-O-N-A-D-E).
- Sour Watermelon Candy can: vertical ribbon reads "SOUR WATERMELON CANDY" (three words exactly — S-O-U-R  W-A-T-E-R-M-E-L-O-N  C-A-N-D-Y). Spell "WATERMELON" with W-A-T-E-R-M-E-L-O-N (ten letters, one M in "melon"). Spell "CANDY" with C-A-N-D-Y.
- Blue Glacier can: vertical ribbon reads "BLUE GLACIER" (two words: B-L-U-E  G-L-A-C-I-E-R, "GLACIER" is G-L-A-C-I-E-R seven letters).
The "COGNITION ELIXIR" text under the DIALED wordmark must be spelled correctly: C-O-G-N-I-T-I-O-N  E-L-I-X-I-R. Bottom band: "DIETARY SUPPLEMENT  5 CALORIE · ZERO SUGAR  12 FL OZ (355 mL)".

CAMERA & STAGING (PIXEL-MATCH reference 1 EXACTLY — this is a label-only swap, geometry must be identical):
- LOW up-angle (~15–20° tilt upward), same as reference 1
- ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL: ALL SIX CANS SIT ON THE SAME FLAT GROUND PLANE — every can's BASE rests at the EXACT same Y coordinate in world space, no can is on a podium, no can is elevated, no can floats. The bases of all six cans form a single straight horizontal line in world space (the line itself is invisible/hidden by the white background, but every can base touches it). Looking at the rendered image: due to the low up-angle perspective, the back-row cans' bases will appear slightly HIGHER on the canvas than the front-row cans' bases (because they are further away — perspective foreshortening). The FRONT-row cans' bases must appear LOWER on the canvas than the middle and back row cans' bases. THE TWO FRONT CANS MUST NOT BE ELEVATED — they sit on the same floor as everyone else, and being closer to camera at a low up-angle their bases should be the LOWEST point in the frame.
- The two front cans MUST BE PRESSED FLUSH AGAINST EACH OTHER — their inner sides touch at the exact center of the frame with ZERO visible gap. The vertical seam where they meet must be at the dead-center X axis of the canvas.
- Cans positioned at the EXACT same horizontal X coordinates and same widths as the corresponding ingredient columns in reference 1
- Cans sized identically (same height-to-frame ratio, same can width)
- Think of this as a literal label swap: take ref 1, keep every position/size, and just replace each colored-ring-plus-ingredients slot with a full intact can. The base positions of all six cans in ref 1 ARE the base positions in this generation — nothing rises, nothing falls.

LIGHTING:
- Bright, soft, evenly diffused studio lighting from above-front
- Subtle highlights running down each can's cylindrical sides
- Soft contact shadow directly under each can's base (small, tight)

Style: clean modern beverage commercial, magazine-grade product photography, hyper-realistic can rendering, glossy crisp finish, isolated on flat white ready for Photoshop. Negative: no deconstructed rings, no floating ingredients, no broken cans, no duplicate cans, no warped typography, no incorrect label colors, no off-white tinting, no colored background, no environment, no ledge, NO GAP between the two front cans (they must be touching), NO elevation difference between cans — front cans must NOT be higher than back cans in physical world space; their bases must all sit on the same horizontal floor.
refImages: Dialed Moods L-Doba Generations/Product REfs/black cherry vanilla.png
